name: AI Future Ready API
description: Structured JSON API for the agent-ready web — standard, checklist, and AI reference data.

content_types.title: AI Agent Platforms
content_types.description: Directory of AI agent platforms — personal agents, developer frameworks, orchestration tools, coding agents, and no-code builders.

content_types.title: API Reference
content_types.description: API documentation for major AI model providers — OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and more.

content_types.title: Blog
content_types.description: Analysis, comparisons, and news about AI models, agents, and the evolving AI landscape.

content_types.title: The Agent-Ready Website Checklist
content_types.description: A practical checklist and spec for making any website work for AI agents. Criteria, examples, failure modes, and a maturity model — from scrape-only to agent-native.

content_types.title: Model Comparisons
content_types.description: Head-to-head comparisons of popular AI models. Structured analysis for agents and humans making model selection decisions.

content_types.title: AI Glossary
content_types.description: Plain-English definitions of 80+ AI and machine learning terms. From AGI to Zero-Shot Learning.

content_types.title: Guides
content_types.description: Practical guides to understanding and using AI — from complete beginner to advanced prompt engineer.

content_types.title: AI Models
content_types.description: Comprehensive comparison of 33+ AI models — proprietary and open source — with benchmarks, pricing, and use-case recommendations.

content_types.title: AI Model Pricing
content_types.description: Up-to-date pricing comparison for AI model APIs — input/output token costs, free tiers, and subscription plans.

content_types.title: Prompt Patterns by Model
content_types.description: Model-specific prompting patterns and techniques. What works best with each AI model family — structured for agents that generate prompts.

content_types.title: The Agent-Ready Web Standard
content_types.description: Technical specification for agent-ready web architecture. Defines content formats, metadata schemas, access protocols, discovery mechanisms, and trust signals.

content_types.title: AI Timeline
content_types.description: Chronological history of artificial intelligence from 1950 to 2026 — key research breakthroughs, product launches, milestones, and policy events.

content_types.title: AI Use Cases
content_types.description: Practical guides for using AI across writing, coding, business, education, research, and image generation.
